/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
import numpy as np
from sympy import Matrix
from sympy.matrices.normalforms import hermite_normal_form

A = np.array([[5, 8, 12], [0, 0, 1]])
inner = np.flip(A)
M = Matrix(inner).T
H = hermite_normal_form(M)
result = np.flip(H.T)
print('A:')
print(A)
print('np.flip(A):')
print(inner)
print('Matrix(np.flip(A)).T:')
print(M)
print('HNF:')
print(H)
print('result:', result, type(result), result.shape, sep='\\n')
print('result.tolist():', result.tolist())

expected = np.array([[5, 8, 0], [0, 0, 1]])
print('expected:', expected, sep='\\n')
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
import numpy as np
from sympy import Matrix, ZZ
from sympy.matrices.normalforms import hermite_normal_form as matrix_hnf
from sympy.polys.matrices.normalforms import hermite_normal_form as domain_hnf
from sympy.polys.matrices import DM

orig = np.array([[5, 8, 12], [0, 0, 1]])
transformed = Matrix(np.flip(orig)).T
print('orig:', orig.tolist())
print('transformed:', transformed, transformed.shape)
print('matrix HNF:', matrix_hnf(transformed), matrix_hnf(transformed).shape)
print('domain HNF:', domain_hnf(DM([[1, 12], [0, 8], [0, 5]], ZZ)).to_Matrix())
print('full expression:', np.flip(matrix_hnf(transformed).T))
print('rank:', transformed.rank(), 'rep rank:', transformed._rep.convert_to(__import__('sympy').QQ).rank())
PY
./.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q sympy/matrices/tests/test_normalforms.py -k 'issue_23410'"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import Matrix
from sympy.matrices.normalforms import hermite_normal_form

row_matrix = Matrix([[5, 8, 12], [0, 0, 1]])
flipped = row_matrix[::-1, ::-1]
column_input = flipped.T
column_hnf = hermite_normal_form(column_input)
row_result = column_hnf.T[::-1, ::-1]
expected = Matrix([[5, 8, 0], [0, 0, 1]])
print('flipped =', flipped)
print('column_input =', column_input)
print('column_hnf =', column_hnf, column_hnf.shape)
print('row_result =', row_result, row_result.shape)
print('expected =', expected, expected.shape)
print('rank =', column_input.rank())
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import Matrix, ZZ, QQ
from sympy.matrices.normalforms import hermite_normal_form as mh
from sympy.polys.matrices.normalforms import hermite_normal_form as dh, _hermite_normal_form
from sympy.polys.matrices import DM
A = Matrix([[1, 12], [0, 8], [0, 5]])
dA = DM([[1, 12], [0, 8], [0, 5]], ZZ)
for label, result in [
    ('Matrix wrapper', mh(A)),
    ('Domain public', dh(dA).to_Matrix()),
    ('Domain internal', _hermite_normal_form(dA).to_Matrix()),
]:
    print(label, result.shape, result.tolist())
print('Matrix _rep equals dA:', A._rep == dA)
print('A shape/rank:', A.shape, A.rank())
print('dA shape/rank:', dA.shape, dA.convert_to(QQ).rank())
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import Matrix, ZZ, QQ
from sympy.matrices.normalforms import hermite_normal_form as mh
from sympy.polys.matrices.normalforms import hermite_normal_form as dh, _hermite_normal_form
from sympy.polys.matrices import DM
A = Matrix([[1, 12], [0, 8], [0, 5]])
dA = DM([[1, 12], [0, 8], [0, 5]], ZZ)
for label, result in [
    ('Matrix wrapper', mh(A)),
    ('Domain public', dh(dA).to_Matrix()),
    ('Domain internal', _hermite_normal_form(dA).to_Matrix()),
]:
    print(label, result.shape, result.tolist())
print('Matrix _rep equals dA:', A._rep == dA)
print('A shape/rank:', A.shape, A.rank())
print('dA shape/rank:', dA.shape, dA.convert_to(QQ).rank())
PY"
